content:
4 deferred security issues for NesVentory (found after commits a0f9c66 / 85491ce):
1. 6 upload endpoints (photos.py, documents.py, location_photos.py, videos.py, csv_import.py, encircle.py) have NO file size limits — DoS risk
2. ~15 instances of str(e) in HTTPException details across other routers — information disclosure
3. Plugin raw_response at ai.py:865 not wrapped in sanitize_raw_response() — minor consistency gap
4. upc_service.py:221,248 passes raw Gemini text without truncation — could produce large payloads

Future task: Remove retired Gemini models from the model selection dropdown in Admin → Settings. Retired models confirmed: gemini-2.0-flash-exp (404 NOT_FOUND as of 2026-02-26). Current working model: gemini-2.0-flash, gemini-1.5-flash, gemini-1.5-pro. The model list is likely in a frontend component (AdminPage.tsx or similar settings form). Also update the default in config.py.
